zh.text: 现代人生活压力大，失眠已经成为普遍问题。据统计，全球约有30%的人正在经历失眠困扰。
位置：手腕内侧，腕横纹上2寸，掌长肌腱与桡侧腕屈肌腱之间。
功效：安神助眠，缓解焦虑，调节心神。
位置：位于手腕内侧尺侧端，掌侧横纹尺侧端凹陷处。
功效：宁心安神，是改善睡眠的重要穴位。
位置：位于足背侧，第一、二跖骨结合部之前凹陷处。
功效：平肝熄风，对肝火旺盛导致的失眠有效。
温馨提示：穴位按摩仅作为日常保健，不能替代医疗。如症状持续，请咨询专业医疗人员。

en.text: In modern life, stress and insomnia have become common problems. About 30% of the global population experiences insomnia.
Location: On the inner wrist, 2 cun above the wrist crease, between the palmaris longus and flexor carpi radialis tendons.
Benefits: Calms the mind, relieves anxiety, and regulates the spirit.

items: Apply pressure until you feel soreness

en.text: Location: At the ulnar end of the wrist crease, in the depression on the ulnar side of the palmar crease.
Benefits: Calms the mind and is an important point for improving sleep.
Location: On the dorsum of the foot, in the depression anterior to the junction of the first and second metatarsal bones.
Benefits: Calms liver wind, effective for insomnia caused by liver fire excess.
Disclaimer: Acupoint massage is for daily health maintenance only and should not replace medical treatment. If symptoms persist, consult a medical professional.
